name: Dataset Audit
description: Audit dataset lineage, schema, splits, label quality, leakage, privacy, and card readiness.

inputs.description: Dataset identifier, local path, or data source.
Expected task or modality for the dataset.
Known private, regulated, or sensitive fields to inspect.

permissions.description: Read dataset files, metadata, card, and sample rows.

approval_points.description: Inspect raw examples that may contain private or sensitive content.
Publish dataset card updates or audit report outside the local workspace.

phases.name: Fingerprint
phases.objective: Record dataset source, revision, file inventory, split mapping, and fingerprint.

phases.name: Schema And Splits
phases.objective: Inspect features, types, nulls, split sizes, label mapping, and distribution drift.

phases.name: Quality And Leakage
phases.objective: Check duplicates, leakage, imbalance, contamination, and label quality risks.

phases.name: Documentation
phases.objective: Review or draft dataset card metadata, license, intended use, limitations, and task tags.

phases.name: Risk Report
phases.objective: Produce a risk-ranked audit report with fixes, caveats, and publication decision points.

required_outputs.description: Dataset source, revision, files, splits, and fingerprint.
Feature types, nulls, examples, and schema issues.
Split sizes, label distributions, and drift indicators.
Duplicate, imbalance, annotation, and quality findings.
Dataset card metadata and documentation review.

artifacts.description: Machine-readable profile of schema, splits, and distributions.
Reviewed sample rows with redacted sensitive content where needed.
Dataset card draft or patch notes.

verifiers.description: Dataset source, revision, split mapping, and fingerprint are recorded.
Feature schema, labels, nulls, and split sizes are documented.
Duplicate, leakage, contamination, and sensitive-sample checks were performed or explicitly scoped out.
Dataset card metadata, license, task tags, and limitations are reviewed.
Audit findings cite profile metrics, sample review notes, and dataset metadata.
